approval.reason: Lifecycle operations require approval before filesystem or git mutation.

preview.summary: Mark the project archived without deleting data.
Prepare branch and commit for archive metadata.

verification.description: Generate and review an operation plan for project.archive.
Require local approval before write-capable adapter execution.
Validate lifecycle result shape before execution handoff.

warnings: This preview does not perform filesystem or git mutations.
Apply-mode execution is blocked until write-capable local adapters and approval gates exist.
